title: TASK-001 — Add Bun runtime marker to tech detector
description: Spec: .specs/sprints/sprint-1/01-add-bun-detector.task.md. Implement Bun support in sendsprint/tech/detector.py and update sendsprint/agents/{dev,lint_runner,test_runner}.py to use bun install / bun run build / bun x eslint . / bun test. Bump 0.4.0 -> 0.5.0.
acceptance: AC-1 detect_tech(path) returns ['bun'] with confidence >= 0.9 when bun.lockb exists
AC-2 bun wins over node when both bun.lockb and package.json present
AC-3 DevAgent.install_and_build() runs `bun install` then `bun run build` if script exists, else StepReport.status='skipped'
AC-4 LintRunner runs `bun x eslint .` when eslint config present in bun repo
AC-5 TestRunner runs `bun test` and parses JSON output
AC-6 All bun agents return StepReport.status='skipped' with reason='bun not installed' when binary absent
Version bumped to 0.5.0 in pyproject.toml, sendsprint/__init__.py, README.md, CHANGELOG.md

title: TASK-002 — Add cargo-audit coverage tests to security reviewer
description: Spec: .specs/sprints/sprint-1/02-add-cargo-audit-tests.task.md. Add unit tests for the cargo-audit branch of sendsprint/agents/security_reviewer.py. Bump 0.4.0 -> 0.4.1.
acceptance: AC-2 3 vulns -> details.cargo_findings=3, findings[*] contain {advisory_id, severity, package}
AC-3 cargo binary missing -> StepReport.status='skipped', reason='cargo not installed'
AC-4 invalid JSON stdout -> StepReport.status='failed', error mentions parse
AC-5 25 vulns input -> findings truncated to 20, details.truncated=True
Version bumped to 0.4.1 across pyproject.toml, sendsprint/__init__.py, README.md, CHANGELOG.md
